title: Count Equal and Divisible Pairs in an Array
titleCn: 统计数组中相等且可以被整除的数对

testcases.input: nums = [3,1,2,2,2,1,3], k = 2 Output: 4 Explanation: There are 4 pairs that meet all the requirements: - nums[0] == nums[6], and 0 * 6 == 0, which is divisible by 2. - nums[2] == nums[3], and 2 * 3 == 6, which is divisible by 2. - nums[2] == nums[4], and 2 * 4 == 8, which is divisible by 2. - nums[3] == nums[4], and 3 * 4 == 12, which is divisible by 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are 4 pairs that meet all the requirements: - nums[0] == nums[6], and 0 * 6 == 0, which is divisible by 2. - nums[2] == nums[3], and 2 * 3 == 6, which is divisible by 2. - nums[2] == nums[4], and 2 * 4 == 8, which is divisible by 2. - nums[3] == nums[4], and 3 * 4 == 12, which is divisible by 2.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4], k = 1 Output: 0 Explanation: Since no value in nums is repeated, there are no pairs (i,j) that meet all the requirements.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: Since no value in nums is repeated, there are no pairs (i,j) that meet all the requirements.
